hotels.name: Tulip Cave Suites
hotels.description_fr:
Situated in the National Park of Goreme, this hotel is housed in a traditional historic cave property. The property features an historic cave chapel reflecting early Christian heritage and rooms with free WiFi.
The authentic rooms of Tulip Cave Suites are carved into rocks, featuring natural stone walls. They are all decorated with traditional handmade rugs and local ceramics. Some rooms also include a private spa bath.
Tulip Cave Suites offers a terrace with panoramic views of the surrounding area. Guests can enjoy unique tastes of Turkish cuisine at the terrace while admiring the views.
The hotel provides a 24-hour front desk, a bicycle and car rental service, and the staff can arrange hot air balloon rides.

Offering an outdoor pool and an indoor pool, Maxx Royal Kemer is located in Kemer. The resort has a private beach, an aquapark and a bay only for children. Free WiFi access is available.
Each room here will provide you with air conditioning, a balcony and a hot tub. Complete with an electric kettle, the dining area also has a coffee machine. Featuring a spa bath, private bathroom also comes with a hairdryer and bathrobes. Extras include a minibar and a seating area.
